data.title: Langsmart Publishes Industry’s First p95 Semantic Cache Benchmarks for On-Premises AI Gateway, Challenges Market: “Show Me the p95”
data.description: In California, Langsmart revealed at NVIDIA GTC 2026 that they passed an evaluation with a Fortune 200 financial firm. The assessment showed Langsmart’s Smartflow platform provides a notable 10.2x increase in response speed, reaching sub-300ms latency on basic hardware. With AI gateway usage rising in enterprises, predictions indicate that 70% of engineering teams will leverage this technology.

data.title: HASC Louisiana Opens Occupational Health Center in Sulphur, Expanding Care for Southwest Louisiana's Industrial Workforce
data.description: In Sulphur, Louisiana, on March 19, 2026, the Health and Safety Council (HASC®) announced the opening of a new Occupational Health Center in the area. This expansion aims to provide easier access to occupational health services for job sites and production facilities in Southwest Louisiana. This move signifies HASC®'s commitment to enhancing workplace safety and health in the region.

data.title: MNA Clinicians with Mass General Brigham Home Care to Hold Informational Picket March 24 Outside Massachusetts General Hospital
data.description: Boston clinicians represented by the Massachusetts Nurses Association are urging MGB to approve their initial contract, which will aid them in delivering crucial home care to patients throughout the region. The clinicians at MGB Home Care are pressing for this contract to be finalized.
